name: EINS Visuals — PVS canonical event emitter

nodes.name: Every 5 minutes (replace with your PVS trigger)

_doc.description: EINS Visuals PVS bridge — example workflow translating any PVS's REST output into the canonical envelope. Customize the trigger + GET node to match your PVS, edit the canonical-event JS to map your fields. Variables needed in n8n: CLINIC_ID, EINS_PVS_SECRET, EINS_PORTAL_URL, PVS_API_URL, PVS_TOKEN.
